task_completion.description: Verify the Autopsy case was created with the correct name and number.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Autopsy main window title bar or case details showing 'Extension_Mismatch_2024' and case number 'INV-EXT-006'.

task_completion.description: Verify the correct disk image was added as a data source.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The left-hand tree panel in Autopsy shows 'jpeg_search.dd' under the 'Data Sources' node.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the Extension Mismatch Detected results.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In Autopsy, the left-hand tree panel has 'Results -> Extension Mismatch Detected' (or similar node under Results) selected, and the main table displays flagged files.

task_completion.description: Verify the mismatch catalog file was created with the correct format.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal displaying the contents of '/home/ga/Reports/extension_mismatches.txt' with the exact header 'FILENAME|FULL_PATH|EXTENSION|DETECTED_MIME_TYPE|SIZE_BYTES|MD5_HASH' and at least one pipe-delimited data row.

task_completion.description: Verify the investigative summary file was created with all required sections.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal displaying '/home/ga/Reports/mismatch_summary.txt' containing the required sections on separate lines: CASE_NAME, CASE_NUMBER, IMAGE_ANALYZED, TOTAL_FILES_SCANNED, TOTAL_MISMATCHES_DETECTED, MISMATCH_CATEGORIES, and CONCEALMENT_ASSESSMENT.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the Autopsy GUI to analyze the disk image.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the Autopsy application open and being interacted with, rather than the agent relying solely on command-line forensic tools to bypass the GUI requirement.

integrity.description: Ensure the catalog file contains actual extracted data, not placeholders.
integrity.visual_evidence: The rows in 'extension_mismatches.txt' should contain realistic file names, paths, mime types, sizes, and MD5 hashes (or 'N/A'), indicating genuine extraction from the Autopsy results.

integrity.description: Ensure the concealment assessment is uniquely generated.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'CONCEALMENT_ASSESSMENT' section in 'mismatch_summary.txt' must contain a uniquely written 1-3 sentence assessment, not the literal placeholder text '<your 1-3 sentence assessment...>' from the prompt.
